predictions.prediction: Increased authoritarian measures in Hungary and other nations within 24 months.
predictions.falsification: Hungary and other nations show improvements in democratic practices within 24 months.

predictions.prediction: New AI regulations will be introduced in the US within 18 months, focusing on accountability and safety.
predictions.falsification: No significant AI regulations are introduced within 18 months.

predictions.prediction: Heightened political violence and protests in the US within the next 12 months.
predictions.falsification: No significant political violence or protests occur within 12 months.

predictions.prediction: Significant forest fires linked to El Niño will occur within 12 months, reversing recent progress in forest conservation.
predictions.falsification: No major forest fires occur within 12 months.

predictions.prediction: Oil prices will remain volatile, with potential spikes above $130/barrel within 6 months if the conflict worsens.
predictions.falsification: Oil prices stabilize below $100/barrel within 6 months and no significant escalation occurs.

predictions.prediction: Increased frequency of infrastructure-related disasters by 2028, with significant loss of life and economic damage.
predictions.falsification: No significant increase in infrastructure-related disasters by 2028.

predictions.prediction: Major AI-related ethical scandals will emerge by 2028, leading to calls for stricter global regulations.
predictions.falsification: No significant AI-related ethical scandals or regulatory changes by 2028.

predictions.prediction: Energy prices will spike globally, with increased volatility in oil and grain markets by Q3 2026.
predictions.falsification: Energy prices remain stable or decline by Q3 2026 despite ongoing geopolitical tensions.

predictions.prediction: Increase in high-profile terrorist attacks globally by 2027, with significant casualties and economic impacts.
predictions.falsification: No significant increase in terrorist attacks or casualties by 2027.

predictions.prediction: Heightened political violence and media censorship will occur in the US and Europe by mid-2027.
predictions.falsification: No significant increase in political violence or censorship by mid-2027.

predictions.prediction: More frequent resource-related conflicts in vulnerable regions by Q4 2027.
predictions.falsification: Reduction in resource-related conflicts due to effective management and mediation by Q4 2027.

predictions.prediction: Sporadic incidents of cultural and social tensions globally by Q2 2027.
predictions.falsification: Reduction in such incidents due to proactive cultural and legal interventions by Q2 2027.

predictions.prediction: Increase in kidnappings and piracy incidents in vulnerable regions by Q1 2027.
predictions.falsification: Reduction in reported incidents due to improved security measures by Q1 2027.

predictions.prediction: Recurring transportation accidents in regions with aging infrastructure by Q2 2027.
predictions.falsification: Significant reduction in accidents due to improved infrastructure and safety protocols by Q2 2027.

predictions.root_cause: Global Political Instability and Armed Conflicts
predictions.prediction: Escalation of violence in Mali, Ukraine, and Afghanistan by Q4 2026.
predictions.falsification: Reduction in violence or successful peace agreements in these regions by Q4 2026.
